bead.title: chaos_test.go suite passes against axon backend
bead.description: Run the existing cli/internal/bead/chaos_test.go (and any related concurrency/contention tests) against the axon backend. Parameterize the test harness so the same suite runs against jsonl and axon backends. Fix any axon-side issues uncovered. Multi-worker fairness, claim correctness under contention, and crash/recovery semantics must hold.
bead.acceptance: 1. chaos_test.go runs against the axon backend (parameterized or duplicated). 2. All assertions pass. 3. Multi-worker contention scenario verified — no double-claim, no lost-update. 4. CI runs the suite for both backends.
